summary: Successfully tested static PDF products landing page. Site converted from full-stack to static - all data hardcoded in App.js, Buy Now buttons link to Payhip URLs, no backend API dependencies. All sections render correctly with proper functionality.

backend_issues.notes: Backend still runs but frontend no longer uses it - this is intentional for static deployment

passed_tests: Homepage loads without any API errors (confirmed no backend dependency)
Hero section renders with title 'Reclaim Your Calm' and CTA buttons
All 5 product cards render with correct titles, prices, descriptions, features
Product Buy Now buttons are <a> tags linking to Payhip URLs (not API calls)
Bundle section shows correct pricing ($29.99, Save 46%) with CTA
Testimonials section displays 3 testimonials (Sarah M., James L., Priya K.) with star ratings
About section with stats (90, 20, 6, 12) renders correctly
Navigation bar has Products, Bundle, About links and Get the Bundle CTA
Lead magnet popup triggers on scroll (40%) with Get My Free Guide button
No console errors about failed API calls or network requests to backend
All navigation links work with smooth scrolling to sections
Lead magnet popup can be opened and closed properly
All product cards show correct branding, colors, and layout
